options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage <ptnName> # Specifies the name of the partition to show wire crossing.

options.name: -allNets
options.description: Reports nets that cross partitions that also connect to the ports of partitions.

options.name: -delta
options.description: Reports the total segment length of the wires crossing the block in the X and Y directions.

options.name: -excludeClock
options.description: Excludes clock nets from the wire crossing information.

options.name: -excludeHighFan
options.description: Excludes nets with fanouts over nrFan from the display.

options.name: -excludeNet
options.description: Specifies the file name that contains nets to be excluded from the display.

options.name: -excludeTri
options.description: Excludes tristate nets from the display.

options.name: -outfile
options.description: Specifies the name of the output file of wire crossing information.
